personal.name: Shyamal
personal.title: Software Engineer & Cloud Architect
personal.subtitle: M.Tech CSE @ IIT Jodhpur
personal.tagline: Building scalable cloud infrastructure, intelligent ML solutions, and full-stack applications that drive real-world impact...
personal.bio: Hi, I'm Shyamal, a software engineer and cloud architect passionate about building scalable systems, automating infrastructure, and solving complex problems with machine learning. Currently pursuing M.Tech at IIT Jodhpur.
personal.description: From orchestrating 40+ microservices on Kubernetes to crafting ML models that predict with precision — I blend DevOps, cloud architecture, and AI to build solutions that matter. My work spans AWS, Azure, Docker, React, and beyond.

whatIDo.title: Cloud & DevOps
whatIDo.description: AWS, Azure, Kubernetes, Docker — Architecting scalable cloud infrastructure for high availability.

whatIDo.title: CI/CD Pipelines
whatIDo.description: Jenkins, automated deployments, rollbacks — Streamlining code release with advanced pipelines.

whatIDo.title: Machine Learning
whatIDo.description: Bayesian Networks, Deep Learning, NLP — Building intelligent models for real-world predictions.

whatIDo.title: Full-Stack Web Dev
whatIDo.description: React, Node.js, Express — Crafting responsive, performant web applications end-to-end.

whatIDo.title: Monitoring & Observability
whatIDo.description: Prometheus, Grafana, Azure Monitor — Reducing incident detection time by 60%.

whatIDo.title: Containerization
whatIDo.description: Docker, Kubernetes, EKS — Orchestrating 40+ microservices with automated deployments.

highlights: Spearheaded cloud infrastructure setup and deployment across Azure and AWS for high availability and scalability
Designed and maintained advanced CI/CD pipelines in Jenkins for code release, configuration generation, and database operations
Architected scalable Kubernetes (EKS) platform on AWS, orchestrating 40+ microservices with automated deployments and rollbacks
Delivered containerized applications using multistage Docker builds, cutting image size by 40%
Built monitoring and alerting stacks with Azure Monitor, Application Insights, and Log Analytics, reducing incident detection time by 60%
Integrated Azure Key Vault with CI/CD pipelines for secure secret management
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to drive DevOps adoption, improving rollout frequency and reducing downtime
Built logic algorithms and managed extensive data using Node.js and React.js, influencing the company's product
Automated tasks with Node.js algorithms, significantly boosting efficiency by 25%
Constructed and deployed REST APIs with Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL
Integrated MERN components (MySQL, Express.js, React, Node.js) to augment product functionality

projects.title: Decision Making in Diabetics Using Bayesian Network
projects.description: Developed a diabetes prediction model using Bayesian Networks (pgmpy) with Hill Climbing + BIC scoring, integrating medical constraints for causal validity. Compared with Logistic Regression, SVM, and Random Forest; deployed via Streamlit.

projects.title: Smart Product Pricing
projects.description: Built an ensemble model by training parallel MLPs on CoCa and SigLIP multimodal embeddings, achieving sMAPE of 40.06%. Developed fast and efficient solution with inference time 0.12 sec per sample.

projects.title: Charusat LOR System
projects.description: Coordinated a team of 5 developers to digitize the Letter of Recommendation process for CSPIT Department, achieving 100% streamlining of administrative workflows.

achievements.title: Led Tech Sessions
achievements.description: Delivered engaging sessions for 60+ students on Open Source, Git-GitHub, and C++ STL

achievements.title: CodePie 3.0 Organizer
achievements.description: Organized university-level coding competition with 550+ participants, supervised 30 core team members and 120 volunteers

achievements.title: Instagram Creator
achievements.description: Building a community of 10.8K+ followers on tech and AI content
